description_long: This house features a rectangular, two-story structure with a flat roof and a modern, minimalist facade. The front elevation displays large, evenly spaced windows on both floors, flanking a simple entry door with a small overhang and two conical evergreen shrubs. The ground level is accented with a stone veneer and a green utility box, while the upper level is clad in light beige siding. The rear of the house opens to a small, enclosed garden area with white flowering plants and additional shrubbery, providing a private outdoor space. The side elevations are mostly solid, with minimal fenestration and a clean, uninterrupted siding finish. The interior layout is partially visible, showing partitioned rooms and a red accent wall near the entryway.
description: A modern, two-story rectangular house with large front windows, a flat roof, and minimalist beige siding. The front features a simple entry, stone accents, and evergreen shrubs, while the rear includes a private garden area.
description_view_0: Front view showing large windows, main entry door, stone base, green utility box, and two conical shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view with solid beige siding, minimal windows, and a glimpse of the rear garden and utility area.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the private garden with white flowers, glass doors, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with uninterrupted siding, partial view of the garden fence, and minimal landscaping.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple flush door with small overhang, stone base, and flanked by two conical evergreen shrubs
